Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to infer based on attributes timestamp activity department patient age patient gender additional info

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The attributes that can help patient age gender department activity and additional info

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The problem says infer the case groupings which events belong to the same case So we need to output something like Case 1 events 1 4 7 12 15 Case 2 events 2 5 8 10 11 14 17 Case 3 events 3 6 9 13 16 18

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: For patient 45 M register in ER then gets triage then doctor consultation then X ray then diagnosis then discharge

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: For patient 62 F register in ER triage lab test requested lab test completed doctor consultation diagnosis minor infection prescription discharge

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: For patient 28 M register in Surgery doctor consultation scheduled knee surgery surgery preparation surgery performed recovery room discharge

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Event 6 Doctor consultation in Surgery department age 28 M reason scheduled knee surgery That seems to be the same patient as event 3 register in Surgery and event 9 surgery preparation event 13 surgery performed event 16 recovery room event 18 discharge So that is consistent

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Event 4 Initial triage in ER age 45 M Event 7 X ray imaging age 45 M Event 12 Doctor consultation in ER age 45 M diagnosis hairline fracture Event 15 Discharge age 45 M So that is consistent

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Event 5 Initial triage age 62 F Event 8 Lab test requested age 62 F Event 10 Lab test completed age 62 F Event 11 Doctor consultation age 62 F diagnosis minor infection Event 14 Prescription created age 62 F Event 17 Discharge So consistent

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Thus we have three distinct cases based on age and gender

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We have three distinct age gender combinations 45 M 62 F 28 M So three cases

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 1 events 1 4 7 12 15 Case 2 events 2 5 8 10 11 14 17 Case 3 events 3 6 9 13 16 18
